title: Trump trial, Day 6: Will judge threaten Trump with jail over gag order?
shortDescription: Live updates from Donald Trump hush money trial as Judge Juan Merchan considers holding Trump in contempt over a gag order.

title: Judge weighs gag order fines in Trump hush money trial
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan will hear arguments Tuesday about whether Donald Trump violated his gag order in the hush money trial by attacking Stormy Daniels.

title: In landmark Supreme Court case, Trump's test case is Richard Nixon
shortDescription: The justices are likely to reject the claim of absolute immunity. But even if they do, Trump may already have won by delaying his election interference trial.

title: Wyoming Republicans endorse Trump, censure governor
shortDescription: The Cowboy State's GOP convention gives Trump the nod and censures Republican Governor Mark Gordon

title: Donald Trump's hush money trial begins
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial is now underway with prosecutors and the defense presenting opening arguments to a 12-person jury.

title: And now, Trump's trial really begins
shortDescription: Opening statements began in Donald Trump's New York hush money trial. It's Monday's news.

title: Sanders, AOC boost Joe Biden's climate agenda on Earth Day
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announces $7 billion in grants to help provide solar power for nearly a million low-income families.

title: Image of Trump statement on O.J. Simpson's death is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: The image is fabricated. There is no such statement about Simpson's death on Trump's Truth Social account or on the former president's website.

title: You can't livestream Trump's trial, but now you can read the transcripts
shortDescription: New York courts typically do not allow for cameras in the court room. But for Trump's hush money trial, transcripts will be published online daily.

title: Trump committee's spending on lawyers hits $76 million
shortDescription: Trump's Save America leadership PAC has covered a large portion of his legal expenses stemming from multiple criminal and civil cases.

title: OnPolitics: What to know about Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump’s hush money trial moved into opening arguments and witness testimony on Monday about a six-figure payout to block a scandalous story before the 2016 election.

title: Trump defense opening statements address Stormy Daniels, Michael Cohen
shortDescription: In Donald Trump's trial for 34 counts of falsifying business records his defense lawyers attacked key witnesses in their opening statements.

title: Trump addresses $175 million bond controversy
shortDescription: Donald Trump responded to New York Attorney General Letitia James and the controversy surrounding his $175 million bond.

title: Prosecutor: Trump 'criminal' sex claims cover-up was 'election fraud'
shortDescription: As Trump looks on, prosecutor Matthew Colangelo lays out the Manhattan DA's case against the former president in his opening statement.

title: Trump and Stormy Daniels: Here's what's not true | Fact check roundup
shortDescription: Roundup from the USA TODAY Fact-Check Team about Stormy Daniels and former President Donald Trump's ensuing hush money trial.

title: Judge approves reinforced $175M bond in Donald Trump civil fraud case
shortDescription: A New York judge approved an agreement Monday to strengthen the $175 million bond in Donald Trump's civil fraud case while he appeals.

title: Trump hush money trial to get underway
shortDescription: Opening statements are now set for Monday in the historic trial of former President Donald Trump.

title: This Pittsburgh primary could test Democratic voters views on Israel-Hamas war
shortDescription: Progressive Rep. Summer Lee, an early advocate of a ceasefire in Gaza, is facing a challenge from a moderate Democrat over her criticisms of Israel.

title: Biden condemns 'alarming surge of antisemitism' amid Columbia chaos
shortDescription: President Joe Biden warned of an "alarming surge of antisemitism" in the U.S. following pro-Palestinian protests last week at Columbia University.

title: Who is Karen McDougal, potential witness in Trump's hush money trial?
shortDescription: As Donald Trump's hush money trial resumes in its second week, witnesses are expected to soon take the stand. Among them could be Karen McDougal.

title: Man sets himself on fire outside court of Trump's trial | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Bill that could effectively ban TikTok. Another GOP lawmaker says he will support efforts to oust Speaker Mike Johnson. It's all on The Excerpt.
